name: Irish Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the sugar, salt, cinnamon, and ginger.
2. Lightly beat in the two eggs.
3. Stir in the canned pumpkin and Guinness beer until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
5. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Bake for 15 minutes.
7. Reduce the heat to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake an additional 45-50 minutes, or until a fork inserted in the center of the pie comes out clean.
8. Let cool before serving.
